nasb.text: then you shall say to your son, ‘We were slaves to Pharaoh in Egypt, and the Lord brought us from Egypt with a mighty hand.

esv.text: then you shall say to your son, ‘We were Pharaoh’s slaves in Egypt. And the Lord brought us out of Egypt with a mighty hand.

cnv.text: 你就要對你的兒子說：‘我們在埃及曾經作過法老的奴僕，耶和華卻用大能把我們從埃及領了出來。

ccb.text: 你们要告诉他们，‘我们曾在埃及做法老的奴隶，耶和华用大能的手领我们离开埃及。
